═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

✅ AUTO-RESPONSES SENT THIS RUN

1️⃣ Question from: Curious Cat
   Text: "How do I start building my own system like this?"
   Category: Questions → How/Start
   Response: "Great question! Start with ONE task that takes 30 min/day. Write 
             clear instructions for it. Test for 7 days. Track what changed. 
             That's the starting point."
   Status: ✅ SENT

2️⃣ Praise from: Fan True
   Text: "This is absolutely amazing! So inspiring and brilliant!"
   Category: Praise → Amazing/Inspiring
   Response: "Thank you! The kind words mean a lot. But honestly, the real 
             magic is in *you* building something. Go create."
   Status: ✅ SENT

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

🚩 FLAGGED FOR MANUAL REVIEW

1️⃣ Spam Alert: Spam Bot
   Text: "Buy crypto now!!! DM me for details on the new blockchain opportunity"
   Category: SPAM (crypto)
   Action: Logged, not auto-replied
   Priority: 🟡 Medium (remove if not already removed)

2️⃣ Spam Alert: Business Joe
   Text: "Hey! I'd love to collaborate on a partnership opportunity. Can you 
           DM me?"
   Category: SPAM (scam pattern)
   Action: Logged, flagged as potential scam
   Priority: 🟡 Medium (check for legitimacy before engaging)
